arts.ttl: Romano announces 'HERE WE GO' on Marcus Rashford transfer
arts.sum: FootballTransfers understands that Barcelona were extremely interested in finalising a move for the 27-year-old, but he is now on the verge of joining Aston Villa on a six-month loan deal. The England forward has been linked with an Old Trafford exit for the entirety of the January transfer window and Villa look set to complete a loan deal amid serious competition from Barcelona and AC Milan.

arts.ttl: Marcus Rashford signing makes a mockery of Aston Villa's grand plans - he brings more baggage than a London to Sydney flight and here's what they should be doing instead to get to the top, writes TOM COLLOMOSSE
arts.sum: TOM COLLOMOSSE: As Rashford and Asensio prepare to join on loan on Sunday for combined salaries at the thick end of £500,000 a week, it feels a little like Villa are making it up as they go along.
